#====================================================================================================
# START - Testing Protocol - DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS SECTION
#====================================================================================================

# THIS SECTION CONTAINS CRITICAL TESTING INSTRUCTIONS FOR BOTH AGENTS
# BOTH MAIN_AGENT AND TESTING_AGENT MUST PRESERVE THIS ENTIRE BLOCK

# Communication Protocol:
# If the `testing_agent` is available, main agent should delegate all testing tasks to it.
#
# You have access to a file called `test_result.md`. This file contains the complete testing state
# and history, and is the primary means of communication between main and the testing agent.
#
# Main and testing agents must follow this exact format to maintain testing data. 
# The testing data must be entered in yaml format Below is the data structure:
# 
## user_problem_statement: {problem_statement}
## backend:
##   - task: "Task name"
##     implemented: true
##     working: true  # or false or "NA"
##     file: "file_path.py"
##     stuck_count: 0
##     priority: "high"  # or "medium" or "low"
##     needs_retesting: false
##     status_history:
##         -working: true  # or false or "NA"
##         -agent: "main"  # or "testing" or "user"
##         -comment: "Detailed comment about status"
##
## frontend:
##   - task: "Task name"
##     implemented: true
##     working: true  # or false or "NA"
##     file: "file_path.js"
##     stuck_count: 0
##     priority: "high"  # or "medium" or "low"
##     needs_retesting: false
##     status_history:
##         -working: true  # or false or "NA"
##         -agent: "main"  # or "testing" or "user"
##         -comment: "Detailed comment about status"
##
## metadata:
##   created_by: "main_agent"
##   version: "1.0"
##   test_sequence: 0
##   run_ui: false
##
## test_plan:
##   current_focus:
##     - "Task name 1"
##     - "Task name 2"
##   stuck_tasks:
##     - "Task name with persistent issues"
##   test_all: false
##   test_priority: "high_first"  # or "sequential" or "stuck_first"
##
## agent_communication:
##     -agent: "main"  # or "testing" or "user"
##     -message: "Communication message between agents"

# Protocol Guidelines for Main agent
#
# 1. Update Test Result File Before Testing:
#    - Main agent must always update the `test_result.md` file before calling the testing agent
#    - Add implementation details to the status_history
#    - Set `needs_retesting` to true for tasks that need testing
#    - Update the `test_plan` section to guide testing priorities
#    - Add a message to `agent_communication` explaining what you've done
#
# 2. Incorporate User Feedback:
#    - When a user provides feedback that something is or isn't working, add this information to the relevant task's status_history
#    - Update the working status based on user feedback
#    - If a user reports an issue with a task that was marked as working, increment the stuck_count
#    - Whenever user reports issue in the app, if we have testing agent and task_result.md file so find the appropriate task for that and append in status_history of that task to contain the user concern and problem as well 
#
# 3. Track Stuck Tasks:
#    - Monitor which tasks have high stuck_count values or where you are fixing same issue again and again, analyze that when you read task_result.md
#    - For persistent issues, use websearch tool to find solutions
#    - Pay special attention to tasks in the stuck_tasks list
#    - When you fix an issue with a stuck task, don't reset the stuck_count until the testing agent confirms it's working
#
# 4. Provide Context to Testing Agent:
#    - When calling the testing agent, provide clear instructions about:
#      - Which tasks need testing (reference the test_plan)
#      - Any authentication details or configuration needed
#      - Specific test scenarios to focus on
#      - Any known issues or edge cases to verify
#
# 5. Call the testing agent with specific instructions referring to test_result.md
#
# IMPORTANT: Main agent must ALWAYS update test_result.md BEFORE calling the testing agent, as it relies on this file to understand what to test next.

#====================================================================================================
# END - Testing Protocol - DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS SECTION
#====================================================================================================



#====================================================================================================
# Testing Data - Main Agent and testing sub agent both should log testing data below this section
#====================================================================================================

user_problem_statement: "Build GeoScope think tank website with bilingual support (Spanish/English), professional design, and complete backend integration for content management"

backend:
  - task: "Team Members API"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "/app/backend/server.py"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "high"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
        - working: true
          agent: "main"
          comment: "Implemented GET /api/team endpoint with MongoDB storage. Sample data initialized successfully. Team data displaying correctly on frontend."

  - task: "Articles API"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "/app/backend/server.py"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "high"  
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
        - working: true
          agent: "main"
          comment: "Implemented CRUD operations for articles with search, pagination, and filtering. Featured articles endpoint working."

  - task: "Analysis Areas API"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "/app/backend/server.py"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "high"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
        - working: true
          agent: "main"
          comment: "Implemented analysis areas endpoint with automatic article count updates. Data displaying correctly on homepage."

  - task: "Reports API"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "/app/backend/server.py"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "medium"
    needs_retesting: true
    status_history:
        - working: "NA"
          agent: "main"
          comment: "Implemented reports CRUD with search and pagination. Needs comprehensive testing for all features."

  - task: "Events API"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "/app/backend/server.py"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "medium"
    needs_retesting: true
    status_history:
        - working: "NA"
          agent: "main"
          comment: "Implemented events CRUD with registration functionality. Needs testing for event registration flow."

  - task: "Contact Form API"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "/app/backend/server.py"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "high"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
        - working: true
          agent: "main"
          comment: "Contact form submission tested successfully. Form data saving to database correctly."

  - task: "Newsletter Subscription API"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "/app/backend/server.py"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "high"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
        - working: true
          agent: "main"
          comment: "Newsletter subscription tested successfully. Prevents duplicate subscriptions and handles reactivation."

  - task: "Data Initialization"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "/app/backend/server.py"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "low"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
        - working: true
          agent: "main"
          comment: "Sample data initialization endpoint working. Database populated with realistic test data."

frontend:
  - task: "Homepage Integration"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "/app/frontend/src/components/HomePage.js"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "high"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
        - working: true
          agent: "main"
          comment: "Homepage successfully integrated with backend APIs. Real data loading, newsletter subscription working."

  - task: "About Page Integration"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "/app/frontend/src/components/AboutPage.js"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "high"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
        - working: true
          agent: "main"
          comment: "About page integrated with team API. Real team member data displaying with loading states."

  - task: "Contact Page Integration"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "/app/frontend/src/components/ContactPage.js"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "high"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
        - working: true
          agent: "main"
          comment: "Contact form integrated with backend API. Form submissions working with proper error handling."

  - task: "API Service Layer"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "/app/frontend/src/services/api.js"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "high"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
        - working: true
          agent: "main"
          comment: "Comprehensive API service layer implemented with proper error handling and response interceptors."

  - task: "Analysis Page Integration" 
    implemented: false
    working: "NA"
    file: "/app/frontend/src/components/AnalysisPage.js"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "medium"
    needs_retesting: true
    status_history:
        - working: "NA"
          agent: "main"
          comment: "Still using mock data. Needs integration with articles and analysis areas APIs."

  - task: "Opinion Page Integration"
    implemented: false
    working: "NA"
    file: "/app/frontend/src/components/OpinionPage.js"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "medium"
    needs_retesting: true
    status_history:
        - working: "NA"
          agent: "main"
          comment: "Still using mock data. Needs integration with articles API for opinion content."

  - task: "Research Page Integration"
    implemented: false
    working: "NA"
    file: "/app/frontend/src/components/ResearchPage.js"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "medium"
    needs_retesting: true
    status_history:
        - working: "NA"
          agent: "main"
          comment: "Still using mock data. Needs integration with reports API."

  - task: "Events Page Integration"
    implemented: false
    working: "NA"
    file: "/app/frontend/src/components/EventsPage.js"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "medium"
    needs_retesting: true
    status_history:
        - working: "NA"
          agent: "main"
          comment: "Still using mock data. Needs integration with events API and registration functionality."

metadata:
  created_by: "main_agent"
  version: "1.0"
  test_sequence: 1
  run_ui: false

test_plan:
  current_focus:
    - "Reports API"
    - "Events API" 
    - "Analysis Page Integration"
    - "Opinion Page Integration"
    - "Research Page Integration"
    - "Events Page Integration"
  stuck_tasks: []
  test_all: false
  test_priority: "high_first"

agent_communication:
    - agent: "main"
      message: "Backend core functionality implemented and partially tested. Need comprehensive backend testing for reports and events APIs, then frontend integration for remaining pages. Contact form and newsletter subscription confirmed working via manual testing."
